# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "2.1"
services:
- name: service1
  url: http://service1.example.com
  plugins:
  - name: request-transformer
    config:
      add_headers:
        X-Service: service1

- name: service2
  url: http://service2.example.com
  plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 50
      hour: 1000
upstreams:
- name: upstream_service
  slots: 10
  targets:
  - target: service1:80
    weight: 70
  - target: service2:80
    weight: 30
routes:
- name: route_to_service1
  paths:
  - /service1
  strip_path: true
  service:
    name: service1

- name: route_to_service2
  paths:
  - /service2
  strip_path: true
  service:
    name: service2

plugins:
- name: key-auth
  config:
    anonymous: null
